title: mapping
text: mapping Specify how data types are to be mapped. USYS$MQL_PARAMS = mapping=1 | 2 Arguments 1 —use original U2. x -compatible mapping. 2 —use new mappings for boolean packing codes (default) Description If this option is not specified, the connector defaults to mapping=2 .
